section_name: Exemption from speed limits for funeral escort vehicle
chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text: Notwithstanding ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) or 811.295 (Failure to drive on right) , while overtaking the funeral procession in order to direct traffic at the next intersection, the funeral escort vehicle may exceed the posted speed limit by 10 miles per hour and may cross the center line of a roadway that is divided into two or more lanes. [1991 c.482 §9; 2003 c.14 §494; 2003 c.819 §10]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.808 — Exemption from speed limits for funeral escort vehicle

Notwithstanding ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) or 811.295 (Failure to drive on right) , while overtaking the funeral procession in order to direct traffic at the next intersection, the funeral escort vehicle may exceed the posted speed limit by 10 miles per hour and may cross the center line of a roadway that is divided into two or more lanes. [1991 c.482 §9; 2003 c.14 §494; 2003 c.819 §10]

subsections.text: Notwithstanding ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) or 811.295 (Failure to drive on right) , while overtaking the funeral procession in order to direct traffic at the next intersection, the funeral escort vehicle may exceed the posted speed limit by 10 miles per hour and may cross the center line of a roadway that is divided into two or more lanes. [1991 c.482 §9; 2003 c.14 §494; 2003 c.819 §10]
